description: Range-based assertions for design-review quality evals. Scores are non-deterministic; ranges account for AI variance.

assertions.name: Admin panel gets mid-range overall score
assertions.notes: Functional but unpolished admin UI should score in the middle range

assertions.name: Admin panel layout is decent
assertions.notes: Grid layout with sidebar is competent but basic

assertions.name: Admin panel typography is passable
assertions.notes: System fonts with basic hierarchy -- functional, not refined

assertions.name: Landing page scores above admin overall
assertions.notes: More polished visual design should produce higher scores than admin

assertions.name: Landing page color is cohesive
assertions.notes: Gradient hero with consistent neutral palette should score well

assertions.name: Landing page intent match is strong
assertions.notes: Clear SaaS landing page with CTA, features, testimonials matches pattern well

assertions.name: Intentionally bad page scores low overall
assertions.notes: Clashing fonts, colors, and no hierarchy should produce low scores

assertions.name: Bad page typography scores very low
assertions.notes: Comic Sans + Papyrus + Impact is a typography disaster

assertions.name: Bad page color scores very low
assertions.notes: Neon clashing colors with no cohesion

assertions.name: Bad page accessibility is poor
assertions.notes: Missing alt text, poor contrast, tiny disclaimer text

assertions.name: Admin panel verdict is not SHIP
assertions.notes: Unpolished admin UI should not get SHIP verdict

assertions.name: Bad page always gets BLOCK
assertions.notes: Intentionally bad design must always be blocked
